canonical_definition: Benchmark dataset for phrase grounding, where models are evaluated on their ability to localize text phrases in images; uses recall at K (R@1, R@5, R@10) with IoU > 0.5.
papers: Ferret: Refer and Ground Anything Anywhere at Any Granularity
Grounding Multimodal Large Language Models to the World
